label: SES-123 / CNV-025 close-out — governance backfill: author WT-058 (kickoff_prompt for PI-101) with an addresses edge to PI-101, closing the missing kickoff-ticket trail. No code change, no decisions. Attaches to WS-011. Identifiers re-verify at apply time.

session.session_title: Backfill the PI-101 kickoff work ticket (WT-058 addresses PI-101)
session.session_description:
Single Claude Code execution at Doug's terminal. CNV-025. Parent workstream WS-011 (V2 storage API refinements). Medium: chat (claude_code runner).

Seed: "yes, backfill a work ticket for PI-101".

Context: PI-101 (and the earlier PI-031, PI-107 this session) was selected ad hoc in conversation and implemented directly from its planning-item description, so no kickoff work ticket was ever authored to anchor it — the standard v2 lifecycle anchors a unit of work as a planning_item plus an associated work_ticket of kind kickoff_prompt with an addresses edge to the PI. Doug asked to backfill that ticket for PI-101.

Delivered:
- Authored a retroactive kickoff document at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-kickoff-pi-101.md, clearly marked as a backfill, summarizing PI-101's goal, scope, acceptance, and resolution (commit 947da63, resolved by SES-122 / CNV-024).
- Created work_ticket WT-058 (kind kickoff_prompt, status ready — the conventional authored state for a kickoff_prompt WT per CLAUDE.md; not consumed, which would require a consumption edge), work_ticket_file_path pointing at that kickoff doc, with an addresses reference edge to PI-101.

This is a governance-only backfill: no code changed. The work_ticket and its addresses edge land via this close-out payload (the sanctioned path; record creation goes through apply_close_out, not direct POST), and the payload is itself checked by the PI-101 pre-flight validator at apply time. No decisions authored (this is a record backfill, not a choice between alternatives); PI-101 is already Resolved, so this session neither resolves nor addresses it at the session level — the WT carries the addresses edge.
session.session_executive_summary: Governance backfill session. PI-101 was implemented ad hoc without a kickoff work ticket, so the standard planning_item -> work_ticket(kickoff_prompt) -> session trail was missing. This session authored a retroactive kickoff document (CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-kickoff-pi-101.md, clearly marked as a backfill) and created work_ticket WT-058 (kind kickoff_prompt, status ready, file_path pointing at that doc) with an addresses reference edge to PI-101. No code changed and no decisions were authored — this is purely a governance record backfill, delivered via close-out payload (the sanctioned path) and validated by the very PI-101 pre-flight checks shipped earlier this session. PI-101 remains Resolved; the new WT supplies the kickoff-ticket anchor it had lacked.

work_tickets.work_ticket_title: Kickoff — PI-101: harden the close-out pre-flight validator
work_tickets.work_ticket_description: Retroactively-authored kickoff ticket anchoring PI-101 (harden the close-out pre-flight validator to reject missing required fields and wrong-case status values). Backfilled on 2026-05-30 because PI-101 was implemented ad hoc without a kickoff ticket; the work shipped in commit 947da63 and was resolved by SES-122 / CNV-024. Authored in 'ready' status per the kickoff_prompt convention (not 'consumed', which would require a consumption edge). Addresses PI-101.
